name: Umm Salama
title: Guardian of Karbala's Soil
shortDescription: The loyal wife of the Prophet (PBUH) who was entrusted with Karbala's soil by him, and realized the Imam's martyrdom when it turned blood red.
fullStory:
Umm Salama was one of the highly loyal and respected wives of the Holy Prophet (PBUH) who had a deep affection for the Ahl al-Bayt, especially Imam Hussain (AS).

Years ago, Gabriel had brought some soil from Karbala to the Prophet (PBUH) and informed him of Hussain's (AS) martyrdom. The Prophet put this soil in a glass bottle and entrusted it to Umm Salama, saying: 'Whenever you see this soil turn into fresh blood, know that my son Hussain has been killed.'

When the Imam was leaving Medina, Umm Salama tearfully asked him not to go, as she remembered the Prophet's Hadith. Imam Hussain (AS) comforted her and said that this was a divine decree.

On the day of Ashura, in Medina, Umm Salama suddenly saw that the soil inside the bottle had turned into fresh blood. She started crying and wailing loudly, and the women of Medina gathered around her. This was the first mourning gathering for Imam Hussain (AS) in Medina, even before the official news arrived.
quoteArabic: يا أُمَّتاهُ! قَدْ شاءَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ أَنْ يَرانِي مَقْتُولاً مَذْبُوحاً...
quote: (The Imam told her before leaving:) Mother! God Almighty has willed to see me killed and slaughtered...
